\tzpentry{ID3878}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3878 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K(\mathbf{r}, \mathbf{r}'; \omega) = \sum_{nlm} \frac{\SphericalHarmonicY_l^m(\theta, \phi) \BesselJ_n(k_{nl}r) \SphericalHarmonicY_l^{m*}(\theta', \phi') \BesselJ_n(k_{nl}r')}{\omega^2 - \omega_{nlm}^2 + i\gamma\omega} \end{equation}
